name: telecommunications_model_based_triage_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: A Telecommunications response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving telecommunications model based triage kestrel tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Arjun Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Arjun Vasquez, accountable for a defensible call in Telecommunications when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Omar Sato
agents.identity: I am Omar Sato, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Telecommunications.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Arjun Vasquez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Arjun Vasquez do?
